name: relative curve RMSE
inputs: F_n, F_prev over T, w_t, L

name: classification
expression: stable/variable/erratic by CoV bands (+single_spike if MAD low)

name: drift score
expression: FDS = sum(w_f*score_f over avail)/sum(w_f over avail)

name: event creation
expression: event if FDS>=event_threshold OR any family>=family_event_threshold

name: cooldown
expression: suppress duplicate within cooldown_versions unless severity up
